---
title: "News"
page-layout: full
---

## Updates

This page tracks concise documentation and release updates.

- [GitHub releases](https://github.com/arnabaich96/DPmixGPD/releases)
- [GitHub commits](https://github.com/arnabaich96/DPmixGPD/commits)

## Current doc structure

- Quarto is the curated front door for workflows and architecture.
- pkgdown is the authoritative API and article reference.
